package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for default_value_injection_scattered_across_handlers: Repeated defaulting logic for pagination, filters, or booleans across handlers.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule024NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule024NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule024NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario024Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule024NegativeService, input Rule024NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
